candidates.why: Best direct top-line revenue row with populated values; more specific and preferable to header/subtotal rows.
Also a revenue total and numerically identical, useful as fallback if label changes across years.
Section/header, not the actual populated revenue line.

variables.notes: Used revenue rows as a priority list, not a sum. Preferred the specific populated revenue line over the header and other duplicates.

candidates.why: Best direct cost-of-sales / cost-of-revenue line; populated and matches the top-level COGS concept.
Component of COGS, but incomplete because direct labor and depreciation in cost of revenues also exist.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Only one COGS component, not full COGS.
Only part of cost of revenues, not the main full COGS row.

variables.notes: Selected the full direct cost row rather than summing components or using partial/unclassified rows.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row and populated; by rule, prefer this single explicit SG&A row over component rows and exclude totals when a clear SG&A line exists.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: A valid SG&A component, but incomplete because an explicit SG&A row exists.
Another component/subline within SG&A, but explicit SG&A row is preferable.
Too broad; includes COGS and other items, so not suitable when explicit SG&A exists.

final_choice.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so selected only that row per hierarchy. It already excludes R&D, so no separate R&D row was added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense, and it appears below EBIT in supplemental disclosures.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This indicates SG&A excludes R&D but is not itself an R&D expense row.
Balance-sheet asset, not income-statement R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated current-period R&D expense row is present on the income statement. The only R&D-related line is amortization of capitalized R&D, which should not be used as XRD.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best recurring interest expense line; preferable to broader finance-cost totals and avoids non-interest finance items.
Also a valid direct interest expense row and numerically identical here; reasonable fallback if labels change.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Recurring finance cost but likely a component of total interest expense, so adding it would risk double counting.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Chose the direct recurring interest expense row. Did not add lease-interest supplemental row because it is likely included in total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line and excludes minority interest, which is required to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent attributable-to-parent equity concept; suitable fallback if labels vary across years.
Also appears to equal parent common equity here; acceptable fallback.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Less suitable because it includes minority interest and potentially hybrid debt.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Used attributable-to-parent equity labels as a priority list for book equity, excluding minority interest.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet non-controlling interest / minority interest line.
Equivalent minority-interest label and good fallback if naming changes.
Income-statement allocation amount, not balance-sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet minority interest labels as a priority list.
